description: The CharacterTeleporter sets up a Slot to teleport a character to the associated teleport exit when the Slot's Collider is hit. The Collider must be of type Trigger unless ``TriggersOnly`` is disabled.

fields.TriggersOnly: Whether to only allow triggers in this component's slot hiearchy to trigger the teleporter.
fields.Exits: A list of slot exits to send the user to, which include rotation and individualized data.
fields.MinimumVelocity: the minimum velocity the user has to be traveling to enter the teleporter.
fields.DirectionReference: Which way is looking forward for this teleporter.
fields.MaxDirectionAngle: If the user's velocity direction has an angle greater than this compared to the ``DirectionReference``, then don't teleport the user.
fields.IgnoreParentUser: Whether to ignore the active user of this component when finding users that meet the criteria to go through the teleporter.
fields.TeleportEntered: Sync Delegates that take Float3 that should be called when the teleporter is entered. For example, RandomAudioClipPlayer and RandomObjectSpawner have sync delegates that can be used here.
fields.TeleportExited: Sync Delegates that take Float3 that should be called when the teleporter is exited anywhere. For example, RandomAudioClipPlayer and RandomObjectSpawner have sync delegates that can be used here.

usage: Place the component on a slot with a collider that has character collider field enabled. Next, specify slot(s) for the user to exit out of in the ``Exits`` list. Walking into the collider zone will send you and anyone else to the target Exit
